name: ai-security
notes: Integrated AI Security lab. Unifies the Copilot DLP, Shadow AI, and Purview → Sentinel stories into one deployment with correlated signals.
All resources use the single 'PVAISec' prefix. Labels, DLP policies, IRM policies, retention, eDiscovery, CC, CA, and Sentinel integration deploy as one coherent set.
Deployment time: ~20-25 minutes. Demo length: 45-75 minutes (much longer than the focused labs).
Required: Microsoft 365 E5 + Copilot licenses + Azure subscription + Defender for Endpoint on test devices.
Picks up DSPM for AI activation as a post-deploy step (see RUNBOOK).

sensitivityLabels.note: Unified AI-specific label taxonomy: 2 parents x 5 AI-focused sublabels each, plus SSN and financial-PII auto-label policies.

dlp.note: 5 policies across CopilotExperiences (2), Devices (1), Browser (1), Network (1).

retention.note: 5 policies covering Exchange/SharePoint/OneDrive plus AI-specific Applications (Copilot, Enterprise AI, Other AI).

eDiscovery.note: Single unified AI-Security-Incident-Review case with broad hold/search queries.

communicationCompliance.note: Activity collection + PII/PHI detection on AI-adjacent messages.

insiderRisk.note: Risky AI usage, data leaks, departing user. Feeds DLP adaptive protection tiers.

conditionalAccess.note: Report-only block on high-risk AI sign-ins + MFA on AI apps.

auditConfig.note: Saved audit searches for CopilotInteraction, DlpRuleMatch, DlpRuleUndo.

sentinelIntegration.note: Full Sentinel stack: Log Analytics + Sentinel onboarding + 3 connectors + 7 analytics rules + 2 workbooks + IRM auto-triage playbook + Microsoft Purview Content Hub solution. Requires Azure subscription.

testData.note: 4 seed emails + 5 auto-labeled documents to exercise every signal path.
